q: I'm active duty and might PCS — can I still build on a VA construction loan in {COUNTY} County?
a: Often yes. VA occupancy rules allow a spouse to satisfy the occupancy requirement, and reasonable timelines apply for active-duty members. Tell us your situation and we'll map it out before you commit. For {BASE1} families and veterans across {COUNTY} County — {CITY1}, {CITY2}, and beyond — the same rule applies.
